description: Turborepo monorepo configuration overrides for avvcenna-devkit
notes: turbo.json detected — HEAD^1 filter applied to all turbo commands
Set TURBO_TOKEN + TURBO_TEAM as GitHub Actions secrets for remote caching
pnpm version is read from packageManager field in root package.json
Use pnpm/action-setup@v4 — reads packageManager automatically, no version pin needed
